body: Calvin — discovery for trial #2 came in this afternoon. Two boxes, plus a USB with the body-cam pulls. I'll log it in tonight; want to split prep Tuesday after standup?\n\n— Marcus
snippet: Discovery for trial #2 came in this afternoon. Two boxes plus a USB...
subject: Trial #2 discovery — split prep Tuesday?

body:
Marcus —

- Tuesday after standup works. I'll take the body-cam pulls.
- You log the paper, I'll cross-reference against the witness list by EOD Wed.
- Coffee at 8:15, my treat.

— Calvin
snippet: Tuesday after standup works. I'll take the body-cam pulls...
subject: Re: Trial #2 discovery — split prep Tuesday?

body:
Calvin — agenda for our Wednesday 1:1:

- Trial #1 voir dire prep status
- Trial #2 conflict scan (re: your Oct PTO)
- Caseload reassignment after my retirement announcement

Send additions by Tuesday 3pm.

— Lorraine
snippet: Agenda for our Wednesday 1:1: trial #1 voir dire prep status...
subject: 1:1 agenda — Wed Feb 18

body:
Lorraine —

Adding two items:

- Cook County Jail visit scheduling for trial #1 client
- Spanish-language interpreter request status for two open misdemeanors

See you Wednesday.

— Calvin
snippet: Adding two items: Cook County Jail visit scheduling for trial #1 client...
subject: Re: 1:1 agenda — Wed Feb 18

body:
Brother —

NOLA is locked Oct 9-12. Pulled three Friday-night options:

- Cochon, 7:30 PM (loud, good)
- Bacchanal, sunset (wine + yard, BYO playlist)
- Compère Lapin, 8:00 PM (splurge, worth it)

Pick one. I'll book. Also: please tell me trial #1 is actually wrapping before we fly out.

— N
snippet: NOLA is locked Oct 9-12. Three Friday-night options...
subject: NOLA Oct 9-12 — pick a Friday dinner

body:
Compère Lapin. My treat — birthday lead-up.

Trial #1 verdict by Oct 8 or it gets ugly. Holding the dates regardless.

— C
snippet: Compère Lapin. My treat — birthday lead-up.
subject: Re: NOLA Oct 9-12 — pick a Friday dinner

body:
Calvin —

Saturday long run route change: Montrose start, 7:00 AM sharp. 12 miles, half-marathon pace practice for those of you racing Nov 1. Cozy Corner brunch after.

Confirm by Friday 6 PM so I can finalize the pace groups.

— Derek
snippet: Saturday long run route change: Montrose start, 7:00 AM sharp. 12 miles...
subject: Saturday long run — Montrose 7AM, 12mi

body: Confirmed. Pace group 7:30. Brunch after.\n\n— Calvin
snippet: Confirmed. Pace group 7:30. Brunch after.
subject: Re: Saturday long run — Montrose 7AM, 12mi

body: Coffee Friday before the status review? 8:30 at the espresso bar by Daley. I want your read on the Hicks judge assignment before we file.\n\n— Marcus
snippet: Coffee Friday before the status review? 8:30 at the espresso bar by Daley.
subject: Coffee Friday — Hicks read

body: 8:30 works. I'll bring the Hicks notes. Two minutes, then we're in court.\n\n— Calvin
snippet: 8:30 works. I'll bring the Hicks notes.
subject: Re: Coffee Friday — Hicks read

body: Calvin — Thursday tempo: I'm out, ER shift swap. Solo it or pull Derek. Sunday recovery still on?\n\n— Amara
snippet: Thursday tempo: I'm out, ER shift swap. Solo it or pull Derek.
subject: Thursday tempo — out, swap

body: Solo it. Sunday recovery still on, 9 AM at the bean.\n\n— C
snippet: Solo it. Sunday recovery still on, 9 AM at the bean.
subject: Re: Thursday tempo — out, swap

body:
Brother — Avec is confirmed for Nov 7, 7:30 PM, party of 2. Reservation under my name. I'm wearing the new boots. Try not to dress like a public defender.

Garmin 265 — wrapped already, do not ruin it.

— N
snippet: Avec is confirmed for Nov 7, 7:30 PM, party of 2.
subject: Avec — Nov 7 7:30PM confirmed

body:
Calvin — Sunday call moving to 2:00 PM your time. Aunt Vivian's calling in for the first ten. Mom baked cookies, en route this week.

Love,
Dad
snippet: Sunday call moving to 2:00 PM your time. Aunt Vivian's calling in for the first ten.
subject: Sunday call — 2 PM, Vivian joining

body: Confirmed, 2 PM. Tell Mom thank you. I'm rationing the last batch.\n\n— Calvin
snippet: Confirmed, 2 PM. Tell Mom thank you.
subject: Re: Sunday call — 2 PM, Vivian joining

body:
Dear Mr. Roth,

Reminder: your next federal student loan payment of $380.00 is scheduled via auto-pay on November 15, 2026. Account balance and payment history are available at greatlakes.org.

No action required if balance is sufficient.

Great Lakes Servicing
snippet: Reminder: your next federal student loan payment of $380.00 is scheduled via auto-pay on November 15, 2026.
subject: Auto-pay scheduled — Nov 15, $380.00

body: Hi Calvin — confirming your usual Saturday brunch table at 9:30 for 2. Veggie omelet on hold. See you then.\n\n— Cozy Corner
snippet: Confirming your usual Saturday brunch table at 9:30 for 2.
subject: Saturday brunch — 9:30 confirmed

body:
Calvin —

Noting the NOLA Oct 9-12 hold. Trial #1 verdict expected Oct 6-8, trial #2 calls voir dire Oct 19. The window is real but tight. Confirm by Sept 25 that you are still going, and I'll flag coverage with Marcus.

— Lorraine
snippet: Noting the NOLA Oct 9-12 hold. Trial #1 verdict expected Oct 6-8.
subject: NOLA hold vs. trial calendar

body:
Calvin honey —

Cookies shipped Monday. Two batches, the chocolate kind, the oatmeal raisin you pretend not to like. Tell me when they land. Call your father Sunday.

Love,
Mom
snippet: Cookies shipped Monday. Two batches, the chocolate kind, the oatmeal raisin.
subject: Cookies en route

body: Half-marathon Nov 1 — I'm at mile 8 with a sign. Mile 11 if I can move fast enough. Brunch after at Cozy. Don't bonk.\n\n— N
snippet: Half-marathon Nov 1 — I'm at mile 8 with a sign.
subject: Nov 1 — spectator plan

body:
Calvin sweetheart —

Birthday card in the mail for Oct 15. Don't open until then. Atlanta sends love. Tell Naomi to call her aunt.

Love,
Vivian
snippet: Birthday card in the mail for Oct 15. Atlanta sends love.
subject: Birthday card — opens Oct 15

body:
Calvin —

Motion-in-limine filings for trial #1 are calendared. Rhonda has the binder. Drop by before lunch tomorrow to sign off.

— Lorraine
snippet: Motion-in-limine filings for trial #1 are calendared. Rhonda has the binder.
subject: Motion-in-limine — sign off tomorrow

body: Confirmed. Stopping by at 11:45 between hearings.\n\n— Calvin
snippet: Confirmed. Stopping by at 11:45 between hearings.
subject: Re: Motion-in-limine — sign off tomorrow

body:
Calvin —

Knee follow-up: based on the February exam, you are clear for half-marathon racing on Nov 1. Continue the strength block twice a week. Ibuprofen capped at 2x/week, as discussed. If you feel the patella tracking off, call before you push through.

— Dr. Leong
snippet: Knee follow-up: based on the February exam, you are clear for half-marathon racing on Nov 1.
subject: Knee clearance — cleared for Nov 1

body: Thank you. Logged. Strength block stays.\n\n— Calvin
snippet: Thank you. Logged. Strength block stays.
subject: Re: Knee clearance — cleared for Nov 1
